title: Adoption Metrics Foundations
shortSummary: Build stronger adoption metrics foundations judgment so product work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Adoption Metrics Foundations is a leverage point inside product. It supports the broader goal of what to build, what not to build, and how to ship it.
coreConcepts: Adoption Metrics Foundations needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good adoption metrics foundations work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Adoption Metrics Foundations should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
